name: IconGen
description: A command-line tool that converts a single source image into all the icon sizes and formats needed for browser extensions, macOS apps, and web apps.
longDescription: A command-line tool that converts a single source image into all the icon sizes and formats needed for browser extensions, macOS apps, and web apps. One command generates every size, saving manual resizing time.

featureGrid.title: Browser Extension Icons
featureGrid.description: Generates all sizes needed for Chrome, Edge, and Firefox extensions.

featureGrid.title: macOS App Icons
featureGrid.description: Outputs the full .iconset required for macOS app submissions.

featureGrid.title: Web App Icons
featureGrid.description: Favicon.ico, apple-touch-icon, and PWA icons in one pass.

featureGrid.title: Single Command
featureGrid.description: Run once with your source image and get every size automatically.

featureGrid.title: Open Source
featureGrid.description: MIT licensed. Audit it, fork it, or contribute on GitHub.
